summary_en: The First Bank of Toyama completed a share repurchase of 2.0 million shares for ¥5.01 billion from May 13-15, 2026, via market purchase including ToSTNeT-3.
title_en: Notice of Completion of Acquisition of Treasury Stock and Termination of Acquisition
translation_en_brief: On May 18, 2026, The First Bank of Toyama announced the completion of its treasury stock acquisition program. The bank repurchased 2,000,000 ordinary shares (representing 3.18% of outstanding shares excluding treasury stock) for a total consideration of ¥5,012,306,500 during the period May 13–15, 2026. The acquisition was executed via market purchase, including off-floor transactions on ToSTNeT-3. This program was authorized by the Board of Directors resolution on May 12, 2026, with an upper limit of 2,000,000 shares and ¥5.5 billion; the actual acquisition was completed within these parameters. The purchase method complies with applicable corporate law provisions and stock exchange rules.
